summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of E-commerce store 'كل جديد KULJADEED' focusing on promotional banners carousel, rewards system, admin dashboard, and core e-commerce features

ui_bugs.issue: User sessions expire quickly requiring frequent re-authentication for protected routes

integration_issues.issue: Protected routes redirect to login even after successful authentication

passed_tests: Homepage loads successfully with proper branding
Promotional banners carousel with 3 banners (New Arrivals, Summer Sale, Earn Rewards)
Banner navigation arrows and indicators working correctly
Rewards banner appears for logged-in users
Admin login with provided credentials (admin@store.com / Admin123!)
Admin dashboard loads with proper stats (Revenue: $0.00, Orders: 0, Products: 6, Users: 8)
Admin Banners tab accessible and functional
Add Banner functionality working (successfully created 'Test Banner')
Banner management interface showing 4 banners with delete options
Products page loads with 6 featured products
Categories section displays 4 categories (Electronics, Fashion, Beauty, Home)
Featured products section displays properly with ratings and prices
Responsive design working on desktop viewport
action_item_for_main_agent: Session management could be improved to maintain user authentication longer for better UX. Consider implementing refresh token mechanism or extending session duration for protected routes like rewards, wishlist, and cart.
